description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #12

500 Follower Special!

"Give our service a try and let's get you on one end of that leash!"

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you want to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Three-P Registration!

Name:

Ideal Role:

BIO:

WКңЙӘКҹбҙҮ PбҙҮбҙӣ PКҹбҙҖКҸ PбҙҖКҖбҙӣЙҙбҙҮКҖs бҙ…бҙҸбҙҮs ЙӘбҙӣs бҙңбҙӣбҙҚбҙҸsбҙӣ бҙӣбҙҸ бҙҮЙҙsбҙңКҖбҙҮ бҙҳбҙҮбҙӣ бҙҳКҹбҙҖКҸ бҙҮxбҙ„бҙҮКҹКҹбҙҮЙҙбҙ„бҙҮ. PPP ЙӘs ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ КҖбҙҮsбҙҳбҙҸЙҙsЙӘКҷКҹбҙҮ Т“бҙҸКҖ ЙӘбҙӣs бҙңsбҙҮКҖs' КҷбҙҮКңбҙҖбҙ ЙӘбҙҸКҖ бҙҖТ“бҙӣбҙҮКҖ бҙҖ бҙҚбҙҖбҙӣбҙ„Кң ЙӘs бҙҚбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮ. PКҹбҙҮбҙҖsбҙҮ бҙҳКҖбҙҖбҙ„бҙӣЙӘбҙ„бҙҮ sбҙҖТ“бҙҮ бҙҚбҙҮбҙҮбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў бҙҚбҙҮбҙӣКңбҙҸбҙ…s бҙЎКңбҙҮЙҙ Т“ЙӘКҖsбҙӣ ЙўбҙҮбҙӣбҙӣЙӘЙҙЙў бҙӣбҙҸ бҙӢЙҙбҙҸбҙЎ бҙҖ TКңКҖбҙҮбҙҮ-P бҙҚбҙҖбҙӣбҙ„Кң.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

500 followers? Holy crap! When I first made this channel on a whim to make a dumb bot making fun of JLLM, I never thought I'd get to this point. Then Robin exploded, and I woke up with her going from 1.5K messages to nearly 40 K with a whole slew of new followers. I was overwhelmed in a great way, and I'm extremely grateful for your support. The fact that you guys enjoy my art (That's how I see my writing) is incredibly touching.

100 followers was a check-in. But for 500, I wanted to give you something special. The Three-P series has plenty of specific character bots of all kinds of different breeds of pet play and pet play-adjacent kinks. But I've now made this bot to hopefully tailor an experience specifically for YOU. Allowing you to ask specifically what you want and go from there. If the LLMs come up with any particularly interesting characters, let me know! I'll happily expand upon them into a dedicated character bot. I'll certainly be using this bot myself for inspiration. Work smarter, not harder~

Token count is a lot lower for this one by design to hopefully allow the LLM's more memory to work with. Once the interviewer matches you with a partner, it's highly recommended that you ADD THE DETAILS OF YOUR MATCH TO PERMANENT CHAT MEMORY.

But whether I'd have 5 followers or 500,000. The main thing is I appreciate all of you. Thank you for making this fun, and I genuinely hope to give you enjoyment for years to come!

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated!

  • Love, Vei~рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ
